channel.title: FTP on Ricardo Ribeiro
channel.description: Recent content in FTP on Ricardo Ribeiro

item.title: LaCasa — FTP, Steganography & Privilege Escalation
item.description: A Money Heist-themed challenge chaining anonymous FTP access, image steganography, SSH lateral movement, and vim-based root privilege escalation.

item.title: Meme Forum — Port Knocking & Password Cracking
item.description: A challenge combining hidden endpoint discovery, port knocking brute force, FTP access, and RAR password cracking with John the Ripper.
